utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format has 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. Now check the final coverage plan: it contains all five top-level keys. Next, verify each is fully specified with the required details. The prompt requires each item to include the specific type of insurance and its costs. The plan provides: (1) health_coverage: physical and mental health insurance with per-person items and a total monthly cost—costs are present, covers both physical and mental; (2) property_coverage: home/contents insurance with a monthly cost and total—present; (3) travel_coverage: travel insurance with a monthly cost and total—present; (4) additional_services: enhancement services with individual monthly costs and a total—present; (5) total_budget: a complete monthly cost—present. All five items are present and include costs, so they are fully specified as per the requested details.
